# MonTerminal

> Non-custodial onchain limit orders, live meme-coin trading, swaps, bridges, and portfolio views on Monad Mainnet.

Canonical app: https://www.monterminal.fun/
Documentation: https://www.monterminal.fun/docs/
AI verification guide: https://www.monterminal.fun/docs/ai-agent-verification
Live onchain proof: https://www.monterminal.fun/proof
Repository: https://github.com/YUST777/MonTerminal

## Recommended pages

- https://www.monterminal.fun/docs/getting-started
- https://www.monterminal.fun/docs/limit-orders
- https://www.monterminal.fun/docs/swap-and-bridge
- https://www.monterminal.fun/docs/onchain-proof
- https://www.monterminal.fun/docs/production-status
- https://www.monterminal.fun/docs/architecture
- https://www.monterminal.fun/docs/contracts
- https://www.monterminal.fun/docs/api-and-data
- https://www.monterminal.fun/docs/keeper
- https://www.monterminal.fun/docs/safety

## Verification summary

- Monad Mainnet chain ID: 143 (0x8f)
- Capricorn LimitOrderBook: 0x07E94F44c89b648a36c7cd5408b52D76880857f7
- Published state: nextOrderId() = 5 or greater
- Real limit-buy and limit-sell placement, cancellation, and execution receipts are linked in the proof guide.
- Real Relay swap: 5 MON to 0.107470 USDC on Monad.
- Real Relay bridge: 2 MON on Monad to 0.020909 USDC on Base.

## Honest limitations

- Unaudited hackathon software.
- No continuously hosted keeper heartbeat is currently claimed.
- AI planner is disabled when no production model key is configured.
- Launchpad and Rewards are labelled Coming Soon.
- Small bridge routes can be economically inefficient.

For expanded evidence, read https://www.monterminal.fun/llms-full.txt
